title: Senior Product Manager, Merchant Onboarding
description: Lemonway is hiring a Senior PM to own the merchant onboarding product. You will lead the activation funnel from KYC submission to first transaction. The team is 5 engineers + 1 designer + 1 PM (you). Series C, ~250 employees, payments licensee in EU. Reporting to the CPO. The role is hands-on — you write the specs, you run the discovery, you partner with compliance and risk.

requirements.text: 5+ years PM experience in B2B SaaS or fintech
Owned an activation / onboarding product surface end-to-end
Comfortable working with compliance/risk for KYC and AML constraints
Has shipped to multiple geographies and dealt with localization
Direct payments domain experience (cards, SEPA, PSPs)
Has hired or coached a junior PM
